We pride ourselves on delivering exceptional products/services and building strong, long-lasting relationships with our valued clients.<br><br><strong>Position Description<br><br></strong>The <strong>Health &amp; Wellness Coach</strong> provides holistic coaching to program participants focusing on the key areas of well-being: nutrition, weight health, smoking cessation and physical. The Health &amp; Wellness Coach will provide telephonic, chat-based, or virtual coaching sessions in an individual or group module collaborating with clients to identify his/her areas of desired change, setting specific long and short-term goals, developing a plan of action, and providing on-going coaching support to ensure the participant is successful in meeting his/her goals. The Health &amp; Wellness Coach will facilitate seminars or webinars, group discussions, provide face-to-face or virtual events as needed based on the Coachâs area of expertise and qualifications.<br><br><strong>Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm EST <br><br></strong><strong>Duties<br><br></strong><ul><li>Deliver coaching sessions to participants via telephonic, video, or chat-based interactions.</li><li>Provide follow-up and monitor participant progress towards identified goals.</li><li>Refer participants to appropriate health, community, educational, and other resources to address barriers to change, promote engagement, and to support achievement of their goals.</li><li>Maintain accurate and complete documentation within designated database/system.</li><li>Facilitate webinars, seminars, small group discussions and other interactive events within subject matter expertise.</li><li>Offer solutions and creative ideas for improving internal processes, efficiencies and enhancing participant and customer outcomes.</li><li>All other duties as assigned.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong><ul><li>Minimum of 3 yearsâ life, health, and/or wellness coaching experience in the following areas of holistic well-being: weight health, nutritional and physical.</li><li>Experience with nutritional/weight management coaching is strongly desired.</li><li>Completion of an ICF or NBCHWC accredited coaching program and/or coaching certification preferred.</li><li>Bachelorâs degree in a health, wellness, or behavioral health related field preferred.</li><li>Experience providing coaching in virtual, telephonic, and chat-based environments.</li><li>Experience executing live trainings to larger groups of participants (in person or
